hero.subtitle: We build sites that don't just get scrolled past — they make people stop and <0>look again</0>.

features.title: A modern stack
features.subtitle: Every element of the site is thought through. From animations to typography — everything has its place and purpose.

micro_motion.title: Micro-motion everywhere
micro_motion.desc: Every hover, scroll, and click has its own animation. The site never feels static.

three_d.title: 3D without compromise
three_d.desc: Lightweight Three.js scenes (<200KB) with lazy-loading. Runs smoothly even on mid-range laptops.

performance.title: Performance first
performance.desc: Lighthouse 95+. Build chunks under 500KB. Lazy images, preloaded fonts, GPU animations.

typography.title: Typography in 4 fonts
typography.desc: Apoc, Azonix, Quffer, Urbanist — dramatic hierarchy from 220px hero down to 14px captions.

stats.satisfaction: Clients returning for a second brief

cta.subtitle: Set up the project in 30 seconds, tell Claude what you want, get <0>a production-ready site</0> in an hour.
